category_sources: source_facts.description says filename encoding conversion tool; official convmv man page says it converts filenames from one encoding to another.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is convmv; official man page NAME section uses convmv.
docs_sources: Official j3e.de man page documents convmv synopsis, options, description, filesystem issues, and author information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official j3e.de distribution provides release tarballs and man page, but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies filename encoding conversion; official man page documents encoding, UTF-8 normalization, filesystem, and recursive rename options.
